title: Víctor Hugo Rodríguez Salguera
text:
💼 Professional Summary
Plant Protection Engineer and Master in Sustainable Agriculture & Agroforestry, specializing in the intersection of geospatial data science and nature analytics. Advanced proficiency in spatial analysis and data modeling using Python, R, QGIS, and ArcGIS to extract actionable, data-driven solutions for complex environmental challenges. Proven ability to translate domain expertise into scalable machine learning and analytical applications. Driven by continuous professional advancement and fully equipped to perform in high-stakes, multicultural professional environments.

title: Víctor Hugo Rodríguez Salguera
text:

Programming Languages: Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-Learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch), R (tidyverse, Google Earth Engine API, Raster, Terra, Shiny), SQL
Version Control: Git, GitHub
Data Manipulation: Advanced statistical modeling, time series analysis, machine learning

title: Víctor Hugo Rodríguez Salguera
text:
💼 Professional Experience

Agri-Data Analysis Professor & Researcher
National Agrarian University | Managua, Nicaragua | September 2019 – Present

Capacity Building in Data Science: Spearheaded academic modules designed to build data science capabilities among students and professionals, specifically targeting experimental design and analysis in plant health, agronomy, and agro-industry
Applied Agricultural Research: Led and executed cutting-edge research projects, utilizing advanced statistical models and data analytics to solve critical challenges in crop protection and yield optimization
Thesis Advisory & Mentorship: Served as lead thesis advisor for undergraduate and postgraduate students, guiding them through rigorous scientific methodologies, data interpretation, and successful defenses in agricultural sciences
Experimental Design: Provided expert consultancy in designing complex field and laboratory experiments, ensuring robust data collection and high-integrity statistical analysis for university-backed agricultural trials



Project Management Specialist
World Vision Nicaragua | Estelí, Nicaragua | February 2012 – December 2015

Efficient Budget Execution: Managed and optimized multi-million dollar budgets for community development initiatives, achieving a high rate of financial efficiency and compliance while strictly adhering to international donor guidelines
Impact & Outcome Achievement: Successfully delivered health and nutrition projects across vulnerable communities, consistently meeting and exceeding target KPIs related to childhood nutrition, health, and food security
Monitoring & Evaluation (M&E): Implemented rigorous data-driven M&E frameworks to track project outcomes, transforming field data into actionable insights and comprehensive impact reports for stakeholders
Cross-Functional Leadership: Coordinated multidisciplinary field teams, local authorities, and community leaders to guarantee seamless execution, sustainability, and high impact of programs and projects

title: About Me
text:
My career bridges agricultural science and data analytics, reflecting a deep commitment to addressing global agricultural challenges through evidence-based decision-making. Starting as a Plant Protection Engineer focused on pest management and sustainable farming practices, I’ve evolved into a data scientist leveraging geospatial analysis and machine learning to optimize agricultural production and environmental stewardship.
At the National Agrarian University, I channel my expertise into teaching the next generation of agricultural professionals, equipping them with data science tools to tackle real-world problems in crop protection, yield optimization, and sustainable agroforestry. This academic role has sharpened my ability to translate complex scientific concepts into actionable insights—a skill that extends seamlessly into consulting and research applications.

title: About Me
text:
Specialization & Expertise

Geospatial Data Science
I specialize in extracting actionable intelligence from spatial data using advanced analytical techniques. My work integrates: - Remote sensing and satellite imagery analysis - Raster and vector spatial data processing - Environmental monitoring and land-use classification - Climate-smart agriculture recommendations


Agricultural Research & Analytics
Applying rigorous statistical methodologies to solve agricultural challenges: - Experimental design and statistical modeling - Yield forecasting and crop management optimization - Integrated pest management (IPM) strategies - Nature-based solutions for sustainable production


Computational & Data Skills
Proficiency in modern data science tools and workflows: - Python: Data manipulation, machine learning, deep learning - R: Statistical analysis, geospatial processing, interactive applications (Shiny) - GIS: QGIS, ArcGIS for spatial analysis and visualization - Version Control: Git and GitHub for reproducible research

title: About Me
text:
Beyond Professional Work
I’m passionate about citizen science and biodiversity monitoring through platforms like iNaturalist, contributing observations to global biodiversity datasets. I maintain an active academic presence through Google Scholar and share research outputs via ORCID, demonstrating commitment to open science and knowledge dissemination.

title: About Me
text:
Professional Philosophy
I believe technology and data science are powerful catalysts for sustainable development. My work is guided by: - Rigor: High standards for experimental design and statistical integrity - Practicality: Solutions must be implementable and scalable in real-world contexts - Collaboration: Multicultural teams and interdisciplinary approaches yield superior outcomes - Continuous Learning: Staying current with emerging tools and methodologies in a rapidly evolving field

title: About Me
text:
Current Focus
I’m actively advancing my English proficiency while deepening expertise in: - Advanced machine learning applications for agriculture - Climate change adaptation and resilience building - Precision agriculture and data-driven farming - Open-source software development for agricultural analytics
